title: Senior Doctor - Max Healthcare - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Max Healthcare - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Max Healthcare are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Max Healthcare:
Max Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
